btn_requires_signin: Sign in or create an account to purchase a scan
how_subtitle: No installation. No account. Just type a domain and get a full security report within seconds.
how_step1_desc: Paste any URL or domain name — example.com works just fine. No account or sign-up required.
how_step2_desc: We run up to 27 security scanners — SSL, DNS, headers, malware, exposed files, open ports, privacy, accessibility and more.
how_step3_desc: A security score from 0–100, letter grade A+–F, and a prioritised list of issues with exact steps to fix each one.
before_after_title: From D to A+ in one afternoon
before_after_subtitle: Most security issues are quick to fix once you know what they are. Here is a real example of what a single scan can uncover.
before_after_footer: All fixes were implemented in under 2 hours using only the recommendations from our report.
pricing_subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need deeper analysis or OWASP compliance reporting.
budgetpixels_desc: Our experts at BudgetPixels perform manual penetration tests, security audits with source code review, and AVG/GDPR compliance checks.
trust_no_share: No data shared with third parties
testimonials_subtitle: Used by security-conscious teams and developers worldwide.
cta_subtitle: Find out what attackers see when they look at your site. Free quick scan in 15 seconds, or upgrade for OWASP Top 10 and deep analysis.
cta_badge: Free quick scan — no account needed
cta_register_desc: to monitor your sites and get weekly alerts.
health_safe: Is my website safe for visitors?
health_safe_good: Yes — your website uses encryption and has security protections in place.
health_safe_bad: Not fully — your website is missing important security protections that keep visitors safe.
health_google: Can my website be found by Google?
health_google_good: Yes — your website is accessible to search engines and loads at a reasonable speed.
health_google_bad: There are issues — search engines may have trouble finding or ranking your website properly.
health_email: Is my email protected against spoofing?
health_email_good: Yes — your domain has email authentication records (SPF/DMARC) that prevent others from sending fake emails on your behalf.
health_email_bad: Not fully — attackers could send fake emails pretending to be from your domain. This is used in phishing attacks.
health_leaking: Is my website leaking sensitive data?
health_leaking_good: No leaks detected — configuration files and sensitive data appear to be properly protected.
health_leaking_bad: Potential leaks found — some sensitive files or information may be publicly accessible to anyone.
health_privacy: Does my website respect visitor privacy?
health_privacy_good: Yes — a privacy policy and cookie consent appear to be in place.
health_privacy_bad: Improvements needed — privacy policy, cookie consent, or tracking may not comply with GDPR regulations.
upgrade_desc: This Quick Scan covers 5 categories. Upgrade to Pro for OWASP Top 10 analysis, malware detection, exposed files, and 15 more scanners.
report_preview_desc: Every scan produces a complete, readable report you can share with your team or client.
report_preview_sample: This is a sample report. Run a scan to see real results for your site.
whatwecheck_desc: 27 security, performance and privacy categories — 1500+ individual checks per scan.
features_desc: Tools built for developers, agencies and site owners who care about security.
features_pdf_desc: Download a professional PDF report for your records or to share with clients and management.
features_compare_desc: Compare two websites head to head across all categories — perfect for competitive analysis or pre/post audits.
features_badge_desc: Show your security grade on your own site with a live SVG badge that auto-updates when you rescan.
features_api_desc: Integrate scans into your own tools, dashboards or CI/CD pipelines. Free, no authentication needed.
features_monitor_desc: Register your sites and get weekly email alerts when your score drops or your SSL certificate is about to expire.
features_github_desc: Add security scanning to your CI/CD pipeline. Fail the build automatically when the score drops below your threshold.
pricing_deep_extras: Error disclosure, HTTP methods, Session, Email, Cookies
auth_create_desc: Monitor your sites and get security alerts.
